message_text: Our finance team was charged twice for invoice NW-2048 after upgrading to the enterprise annual plan. Please review the duplicate charge today because procurement is holding the PO until we respond.
Two premium users cannot log in after last night's MFA reset. One account is locked after repeated attempts and the team needs workspace access before a customer call this afternoon.
We need a security review, updated pricing, and a redline-ready NDA for your analytics add-on before our vendor shortlist closes next week.
